text:

Log:
  security/botan2: reduce SOVERSION churn

  ABI isn't compatible between minor updates, so SONAME changes very
  frequently which requires rebuilding consumers.

  PR:		237019
  Submitted by:	Ralf van der Enden (maintainer)
